title: althaea hiri
intro: Althaea hiri, also known as the Marshmallow Plant or Althaea hirsuta, is a perennial herb native to Europe and Western Asia. It possesses anti-inflammatory and demulcent properties, making it a valuable medicinal plant, as it forms a soothing barrier on mucous membranes and has been used to treat digestive issues. The health benefits of Althaea hiri include its ability to relieve symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome (IBS), soothe sore throats, and reduce inflammation in the digestive tract. Althaea hiri can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or syrup, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine and a staple in many herbal remedies.
